description:
Creates a compliance document

**Procore Pay must be enabled to use this endpoint.**

effective_at.description: Date and time the document is effective

expires_at.description: Date and time the document expires

created_at.description: Date and time the document was created

updated_at.description: Date and time the document was last updated

reviewed_at.description: Date and time the document was last reviewed

created_by_id.description: User ID of the user who created the document

created_by.description: Name of the user who created the document

updated_by_id.description: User ID of the user who last updated the document

updated_by.description: Name of the user who last updated the document

reviewed_by_id.description: User ID of the user who last reviewed the document

reviewed_by.description: Name of the user who last reviewed the document

compliance_document_prostore_files.description: Array of compliance document prostore files

document_type.description: Document type of the compliance document

effective_at.description: Effective date of the compliance document

expires_at.description: Expiration date of the compliance document
